privileged_info_summary: The target user group 'SURVEY' is synthetically generated and dynamically injected into the Vicidial database via setup_task.sh. All target shift parameters, including the shift ID (SURVEY_EVE), start time (1700), shift length (0500), and enforcement level (ALL), match the exact specifications required by the task description and export evaluation scripts.
